fieldValues.value: If FieldAssignment.repeatable is true, its corresponding FieldValue…

If `FieldAssignment.repeatable` is true, its corresponding `FieldValue` may use `entries`. If `minItems` is specified, `entries` must contain at least that many items. If `maxItems` is specified, `entries` must not exceed that count. For repeatable fields, `Field.validationRules` are evaluated against each `FieldValueEntry.value` individually, not against the array as a whole.
